---
title: "UC CA-SSN Sample Maps"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  cwd <- getwd()
  project_name <- "Request for Sentinel Site Geospatial Data to Support WERK-SEED Development"
  project_root <- if (basename(cwd) == "scripts") {
    normalizePath(file.path(cwd, ".."), mustWork = FALSE)
  } else if (basename(cwd) == project_name) {
    normalizePath(cwd, mustWork = FALSE)
  } else {
    normalizePath(file.path(cwd, "projects", project_name), mustWork = FALSE)
  }

  project_lib <- file.path(project_root, ".Rlib")
  shared_lib <- file.path(dirname(project_root), "gap-maps", ".Rlib")
  lib_paths <- c()
  if (dir.exists(project_lib)) lib_paths <- c(lib_paths, project_lib)
  if (dir.exists(shared_lib)) lib_paths <- c(lib_paths, shared_lib)
  if (length(lib_paths) > 0) .libPaths(c(lib_paths, .libPaths()))

  library(sf)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(tigris)
  library(rmapshaper)
  library(rnaturalearth)
  library(elevatr)
  library(terra)
})

data_dir <- file.path(project_root, "data")
out_dir <- file.path(project_root, "sample_maps")
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

points_path <- file.path(
  data_dir, "uc_cassn_points_sites", "uc_cassn_points_sites.shp"
)
polygons_path <- file.path(
  data_dir, "uc_cassn_polygons_sites", "uc_cassn_polygons_sites.shp"
)

points_sf <- st_read(points_path, quiet = TRUE) %>%
  rename(site_name = rsrv_nm)
polygons_sf <- st_read(polygons_path, quiet = TRUE) %>%
  rename(site_name = Name, campus = Campus)

status_levels <- c(
  "Not yet visited",
  "Infrastructure set up",
  "Collecting data (1st round)",
  "Collecting data (2nd round)"
)
status_palette <- c(
  "Not yet visited" = "#D9D9D9",
  "Infrastructure set up" = "#F2C300",
  "Collecting data (1st round)" = "#74C476",
  "Collecting data (2nd round)" = "#238B45"
)

points_sf$status <- factor(points_sf$status, levels = status_levels)

options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)
ca <- tigris::states(cb = TRUE, year = 2023, class = "sf") %>%
  filter(NAME == "California") %>%
  st_transform(4326)
ca <- rmapshaper::ms_simplify(ca, keep = 0.08, keep_shapes = TRUE)
ca_bb <- st_bbox(ca)
water_color <- "#D6E8F2"

build_lakes <- function(ca) {
  sf::sf_use_s2(FALSE)
  on.exit(sf::sf_use_s2(TRUE), add = TRUE)
  tryCatch(
    {
      rnaturalearth::ne_download(
        scale = 50, type = "lakes", category = "physical", returnclass = "sf"
      ) %>%
        st_transform(4326) %>%
        st_make_valid() %>%
        st_filter(st_buffer(ca, 0.05))
    },
    error = function(e) {
      st_sf(geometry = st_sfc(crs = 4326))
    }
  )
}

build_hillshade <- function(ca) {
  tryCatch(
    {
      ca_bb_sf <- st_as_sf(st_as_sfc(st_bbox(ca)))
      ca_elev <- elevatr::get_elev_raster(locations = ca_bb_sf, z = 6, clip = "bbox")
      ca_terra <- terra::rast(ca_elev)
      slope <- terra::terrain(ca_terra, "slope", unit = "radians")
      aspect <- terra::terrain(ca_terra, "aspect", unit = "radians")
      hs <- terra::shade(slope, aspect, angle = 30, direction = 315)
      hs <- terra::mask(hs, terra::vect(ca))
      hs_df <- as.data.frame(hs, xy = TRUE)
      names(hs_df)[3] <- "hillshade"
      hs_df <- hs_df[!is.na(hs_df$hillshade), ]
      hs_range <- range(hs_df$hillshade)
      hs_df$hillshade <- (hs_df$hillshade - hs_range[1]) / (hs_range[2] - hs_range[1])
      hs_df
    },
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

lakes <- build_lakes(ca)
hs_df <- build_hillshade(ca)

base_map <- function() {
  p <- ggplot()

  if (!is.null(hs_df)) {
    p <- p +
      geom_raster(data = hs_df, aes(x = x, y = y, fill = hillshade), alpha = 0.45) +
      scale_fill_gradient(low = "#666666", high = "#FFFFFF", guide = "none")
  }

  p +
    geom_sf(data = ca, fill = NA, color = "#909090", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_sf(data = lakes, fill = water_color, color = NA) +
    coord_sf(
      crs = 4326,
      xlim = c(ca_bb["xmin"], ca_bb["xmax"]),
      ylim = c(ca_bb["ymin"], ca_bb["ymax"]),
      expand = FALSE
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      axis.title = element_blank(),
      axis.text = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15, hjust = 0.02),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.02, color = "#555555")
    )
}

points_plot <- base_map() +
  geom_sf(
    data = points_sf,
    color = "black",
    size = 2.4,
    alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "UC CA-SSN Points"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

polygon_plot <- base_map() +
  geom_sf(
    data = polygons_sf,
    fill = "#CDE3B5",
    color = "#486B32",
    linewidth = 0.35,
    alpha = 0.55
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "UC CA-SSN Polygons"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "uc_cassn_points_sites_map.png"),
  plot = points_plot,
  width = 11,
  height = 8.5,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "uc_cassn_polygons_sites_map.png"),
  plot = polygon_plot,
  width = 11,
  height = 8.5,
  dpi = 300
)
```

## Points

```{r}
points_plot
```

## Polygons

```{r}
polygon_plot
```
